# Conflicting Edit Test

Test what happens when the EXACT text you highlighted is modified.

## Section 1: Highlight Target

<!-- ANNOTATED: 1 highlight -->
**Trip 1 Instructions**: Highlight "MODIFIED annotation anchoring system" below.
<!-- /ANNOTATED -->

The MODIFIED annotation anchoring system handles content changes. This exact phrase will be MODIFIED in Trip 2, creating a conflict with your highlight.

## Section 2: Another Target

<!-- ANNOTATED: 1 highlight -->
**Trip 1 Instructions**: Highlight "WILL DEFINITELY SHIFT DOWN" below.
<!-- /ANNOTATED -->

This text WILL DEFINITELY SHIFT DOWN and be MODIFIED. We'll change it to uppercase to see how anchoring handles the conflict.
